query:
SELECT 
                id, url, status, created_at, updated_at, completed_at,
                max_pages, max_depth, respect_robots_txt, include_subdomains, 
                rate_limit_ms, user_agent, lighthouse_analysis,
                total_pages, pages_crawled, total_issues, 
                critical_issues, warning_issues, info_issues,
                progress, current_stage, error_message,
                (SELECT SUM(word_count) FROM pages WHERE job_id = jobs.id) as "calc_total_words: i64",
                (SELECT AVG(load_time_ms) FROM pages WHERE job_id = jobs.id) as "calc_avg_load_time: f64",
                (
                    SELECT AVG(page_score)
                    FROM (
                        SELECT MAX(0, 100 - COALESCE(SUM(
                            CASE
                                WHEN i.severity = 'critical' THEN 10
                                WHEN i.severity = 'warning' THEN 5
                                ELSE 1
                            END
                        ), 0)) as page_score
                        FROM pages p
                        LEFT JOIN issues i ON i.page_id = p.id
                        WHERE p.job_id = jobs.id
                        GROUP BY p.id
                    )
                ) as "calc_seo_score: f64"
            FROM jobs
            WHERE status IN ('pending', 'running')
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
